source: Destatis Mikrozensus 2022, Bevoelkerung 25 bis 64 Jahre mit ISCED 5-8 (Hochschulabschluss), Anteil an der Bevoelkerung gleicher Altersgruppe.
vintage_status: approximation: published aggregates used; not pulled from Genesis-Online for this pilot. The replication package will pin the exact table version.
unit: share of working-age population (25 to 64) with tertiary qualification

afd_2025_share_by_land._provenance: Bundeswahlleiter certified Zweitstimmen by Land, 23 February 2025 federal election (approximate published figures; replication package will pin certified Landesergebnisse).

differential_note: Differential = AfD(low-graduate Land) minus AfD(high-graduate Land) = 0.34 - 0.15 = +0.19. Bayern (0.20) is the alternative high-graduate-Land per the prompt's 'depending on aggregation level' caveat; using Bayern gives differential = 0.34 - 0.20 = +0.14. Pilot uses the actual-maximum-graduate-share Land (Berlin).
